title: Nondual Awareness and Minimal Phenomenal Experience.

assets.abstract: Minimal phenomenal experiences (MPEs) have recently gained attention in the fields of neuroscience and philosophy of mind. They can be thought of as episodes of greatly reduced or even absent phenomenal content together with a reduced level of arousal. It has also been proposed that MPEs are cases of consciousness-as-such. Here, we present a different perspective, that consciousness-as-such is first and foremost a type of awareness, that is, non-conceptual, non-propositional, and nondual, in oth

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
